name: Bestion
short_description: Bestion is a game that combines Roguelike tower defense elements with automated factory construction. Players are required to construct their own factory on a planet and protect the kernel from monster attacks.
detailed_description:
Bestion is a game that combines Roguelike tower defense elements with automated factory construction. Players are required to construct their own factory on a planet and protect the kernel from monster attacks.

  • Build various defense towers to protect your factory from enemies attacking from all directions.
  • Items sold in the store can effectively help resist monster attacks.
  • Multiple upgradable technologies that provide powerful abilities.
about_the_game:
